title: Dashboard Exporting
excerpt: Is it possible to export an entire dashboard? Similar to how you can export individual widgets, but I’m looking for an easier way to do all of the widgets. It could be a .zip folder that I can download with all the widge…

posts.author: mmeneses (Matt Meneses)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to export an entire dashboard? Similar to how you can export individual widgets, but I’m looking for an easier way to do all of the widgets. It could be a .zip folder that I can download with all the widgets in an image format. What would y’all recommend?
